description_long: This object is a large green metal dumpster with a ribbed, hinged black lid, commonly found in urban environments for waste collection. The dumpster is accompanied by three blue metal barrels, one of which is lying on its side, and a stack of weathered wooden pallets with a broken plank. The dumpster's exterior shows signs of wear, including rust, grime, and faded graffiti or signage. The lid appears to be made of heavy-duty plastic or metal and is designed to be lifted for depositing trash. The barrels and pallets are arranged closely around the dumpster, suggesting a cluttered, utilitarian setting. The overall scene evokes a back alley or service area where waste and recyclables are temporarily stored.
description: A large green metal dumpster with a ribbed black lid, surrounded by blue barrels and stacked wooden pallets, showing signs of urban wear and use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dumpster's main access side, three blue barrels, and a stack of wooden pallets with a broken plank.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the stacked wooden pallets and the edge of the dumpster's lid, with barrels mostly out of sight.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the dumpster, the full stack of pallets, and all three barrels, one lying on its side.
description_view_3: Angled view focusing on the barrels in the foreground, the dumpster's lid, and the top of the pallet stack.
attribute_lid_type: hinged, ribbed, single-section lid made of black plastic or metal, no visible locking mechanism
attribute_warning_labels: white rectangular label with faded text and symbols on the front
attribute_placement_location: outdoor commercial area or service alley
